TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Wachirawit_Ruangwiwat, title = Wachirawit_Ruangwiwat, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wachirawit_Ruangwiwat} }

S.FORM: Wachirawit Ruangwiwat kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 1, Wachirawit Ruangwiwat, squliq na Thailand'. qyanux nya pincyogan nya(qnxan) bincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Wachirawit Ruangwiwat kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 1, Wachirawit Ruangwiwat, squliq na Thailand'. qyanux nya pincyogan nya(qnxan) bincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: waʦ~ʨħirawit ruaŋwiwat kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, waʦ~ʨħirawit ruaŋwiwat, s~ɕquliq na tħailan*ʔ. qjanux nja pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja(qnxan) βinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
